message:
feat: Implement sqlite3 with real C bindings to libsqlite3

Vendored sqlite3.h from system SQLite 3.51.1 library.

Connection:
- sqlite3_open() to open database files
- sqlite3_close() to close connection
- sqlite3_busy_timeout() for busy timeout
- sqlite3_create_function() for user-defined functions
- sqlite3_create_collation() for custom collations
- sqlite3_progress_handler() for progress callbacks
- sqlite3_trace() for SQL tracing
- sqlite3_enable_load_extension() and sqlite3_load_extension()
- sqlite3_interrupt() to cancel queries
- sqlite3_set_authorizer() for access control
- sqlite3_backup_init/step/finish() for database backup
- sqlite3_total_changes() for change count

Cursor:
- sqlite3_prepare_v2() to compile SQL
- sqlite3_bind_text/null() for parameter binding
- sqlite3_step() to execute
- sqlite3_column_count/name/type/text/bytes() for results
- sqlite3_changes() and sqlite3_last_insert_rowid()
- sqlite3_finalize() cleanup

Module functions:
- sqlite3_enable_shared_cache() for shared cache mode
- Global adapter/converter registries

Blob:
- sqlite3_blob_open() to open blob handle
- sqlite3_blob_read/write() for incremental I/O
- sqlite3_blob_bytes() for size
- sqlite3_blob_close() cleanup
